query:
SELECT 'field_defs' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM stage_field_definitions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'requirements', COUNT(*) FROM lifecycle_requirements
UNION ALL
SELECT 'services', COUNT(*) FROM lifecycle_services;
